<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Perfumados — Inicio</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Pinyon+Script&family=Cause:wght@100..900&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --gold:#b8976a;--gold-light:#d4b896;--gold-dark:#8a6d47;
  --cream:#faf7f2;--cream-dark:#f0ebe1;--ink:#1a1612;
  --ink-soft:#3d3530;--muted:#8c7f74;
  --border:rgba(184,151,106,0.25);--border-strong:rgba(184,151,106,0.5);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
  background:var(--ink);color:var(--cream);
  font-family:'Cause',sans-serif;font-size:14px;
  min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}

/* ── FONDO ── */
.bg{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(184,151,106,0.07) 0%, transparent 55%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 85% 15%, rgba(184,151,106,0.05) 0%, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 90%, rgba(184,151,106,0.04) 0%, transparent 45%);
}
.bg-grid{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(rgba(184,151,106,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(184,151,106,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px;
}

/* ── HEADER ── */
header{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  padding:2.5rem 3rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(184,151,106,0.15);
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
}
.header-logo{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;
}
.header-logo img{height:36px;width:auto;filter:brightness(0) invert(1);opacity:0.9;}
.header-badge{
  font-size:8px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);border:0.5px solid rgba(184,151,106,0.4);
  padding:2px 8px;
}
.header-meta{
  font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:4rem 2rem;text-align:center;
  min-height:70vh;
}
.hero-eye{
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.4em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;
}
.hero-eye::before,.hero-eye::after{content:'';width:24px;height:0.5px;background:var(--gold);opacity:0.6;}
.hero-title{
  font-family:'Pinyon Script',cursive;
  font-size:clamp(2.5rem,6vw,5rem);
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  line-height:1.05;margin-bottom:0.75rem;
}
.hero-sub{
  font-family:'Great Vibes',cursive;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(1rem,2.5vw,1.4rem);
  color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:3.5rem;opacity:0.8;
}
.hero-line{width:40px;height:0.5px;background:var(--gold);margin:0 auto 3.5rem;opacity:0.5;}

/* ── CARDS ── */
.cards{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:1px;
  background:rgba(184,151,106,0.15);
  border:0.5px solid rgba(184,151,106,0.2);
  max-width:860px;width:100%;
  margin:0 auto;
}
.card{
  background:rgba(26,22,18,0.7);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  padding:2.5rem 2rem;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:flex-start;gap:0.75rem;
  text-decoration:none;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:background 0.3s;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;
}
.card:hover{background:rgba(184,151,106,0.08);}
.card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.card-icon{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;}
.card-num{
  font-size:8px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(184,151,106,0.4);
}
.card-title{
  font-family:'Pinyon Script',cursive;
  font-size:1.6rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  line-height:1.1;
}
.card-desc{
  font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  line-height:1.6;
}
.card-arrow{
  font-size:12px;color:var(--gold);opacity:0;
  transition:opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  margin-top:auto;padding-top:1rem;
}
.card:hover .card-arrow{opacity:1;transform:translateX(4px);}
.card.main{
  grid-column:1/-1;
  flex-direction:row;align-items:center;
  padding:2rem 2.5rem;gap:2rem;
  background:rgba(184,151,106,0.06);
}
.card.main .card-content{flex:1;}
.card.main .card-icon{font-size:2rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.card.main .card-title{font-size:2rem;}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  padding:2rem 3rem;
  border-top:0.5px solid rgba(184,151,106,0.1);
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  margin-top:4rem;
}
.footer-copy{
  font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.08em;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}
.footer-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;}
.footer-links a{
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);text-decoration:none;
  transition:color 0.2s;
}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}

/* ── ANIMACIÓN ENTRADA ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{
  from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}
  to{opacity:1;transform:none;}
}
.hero-eye{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease 0.1s both;}
.hero-title{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease 0.2s both;}
.hero-sub{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease 0.3s both;}
.hero-line{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease 0.35s both;}
.cards{animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease 0.4s both;}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:768px){
  header{padding:1.5rem;}
  .header-meta{display:none;}
  .cards{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .card.main{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;text-align:center;}
  .footer-links{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .hero{min-height:50vh;padding:3rem 1.5rem;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="bg"></div>
<div class="bg-grid"></div>

<!-- HEADER -->
<header>
  <div class="header-logo">
    <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Perfumados">
    <span class="header-badge">Archivos del proyecto</span>
  </div>
  <span class="header-meta">El Salvador · 2026</span>
</header>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <p class="hero-eye">Bienvenido</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Perfumados</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Elige dónde quieres ir</p>
  <div class="hero-line"></div>

  <!-- CARDS -->
  <div class="cards">

    <!-- Card principal: Sitio web -->
    <a class="card main" href="perfumados.html">
      <span class="card-icon">🛍</span>
      <div class="card-content">
        <span class="card-num">Principal</span>
        <div class="card-title">Tienda Perfumados</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Catálogo de perfumes, creador de loción personalizada, carrito de compras y panel de administración.</p>
      </div>
      <span class="card-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

    <!-- Brand Guidelines -->
    <a class="card" href="perfumados-brand.html">
      <span class="card-icon">🎨</span>
      <span class="card-num">01</span>
      <div class="card-title">Brand Guidelines</div>
      <p class="card-desc">Logotipos, paleta de color, tipografía, jerarquía y colores olfativos. Manual de identidad visual.</p>
      <span class="card-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

    <!-- Proceso creativo -->
    <a class="card" href="perfumados-proceso.html">
      <span class="card-icon">⚗️</span>
      <span class="card-num">02</span>
      <div class="card-title">Proceso Creativo</div>
      <p class="card-desc">Concepto, decisiones técnicas, evolución del catálogo y del creador de perfumes, desafíos resueltos.</p>
      <span class="card-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

    <!-- Brand Guidelines actualizado -->
    <a class="card" href="perfumados-brand.html">
      <span class="card-icon">📐</span>
      <span class="card-num">03</span>
      <div class="card-title">Evolución del producto</div>
      <p class="card-desc">Fases del catálogo, evolución del creador de loción, lógica de precios dinámicos y guardado de fórmulas.</p>
      <span class="card-arrow">→</span>
    </a>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <span class="footer-copy">© 2026 Perfumados · Todos los derechos reservados.</span>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="perfumados.html">Tienda</a>
    <a href="perfumados-brand.html">Brandbook</a>
    <a href="perfumados-proceso.html">Proceso</a>
  </div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
